source: AIBAST RAR Agent Library — human_resources_stacks + general_stacks

ideas.name: Ask HR Assistant
ideas.desc: AI-powered HR assistant for time-off requests, benefits inquiries, parental leave, and policy lookups. Answers employee questions by pulling from the latest policy documents and employee handbooks.

ideas.name: Email Drafting
ideas.desc: AI-powered email drafting for outreach, follow-ups, proposals, and template management with personalization. Generates professional HR communications for offer letters, policy updates, and employee notifications.

ideas.name: Triage Bot
ideas.desc: Inquiry classification, routing, priority assessment, and handoff summary generation. Routes employee inquiries to the right HR team (benefits, payroll, compliance, employee relations) with context.

ideas.name: Cross-Selling Opportunities
ideas.desc: Identifies cross-selling opportunities via product affinity analysis, customer ownership mapping, and revenue impact projections. In HR context: identifies benefits enrollment gaps and recommends relevant programs.

ideas.name: Customer 360 (Employee View)
ideas.desc: Unified customer profiles merging CRM, support, and billing data with health scores and next-best-action recommendations. Applied to HR: unified employee profiles combining performance, engagement, and service history.
